section_name: Location of and Distance Between Call Boxes
text: The location of the emergency call boxes shall be determined by the department in accordance with the design specifications of the system.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 226. Emergency Highway Call Box System
##### § 226.005 — Location of and Distance Between Call Boxes

The location of the emergency call boxes shall be determined by the department in accordance with the design specifications of the system.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1171, Sec. 1.42, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The location of the emergency call boxes shall be determined by the department in accordance with the design specifications of the system.
